items.title: Arsenal are still Premier League title favorites, and here's why
items.summary: Arsenal suffered a huge blow to their Premier League title hopes in Sunday's 2-1 defeat at Manchester City.

items.title: Is the Premier League now Man City's to lose? Plus, Bayern clinch Bundesliga, more
items.summary: Man City's win over Arsenal has thrown the title race back in City's favor.

items.title: Rose to replace Iraola as Bournemouth head coach
items.summary: Bournemouth have confirmed Marco Rose will replace the departing Andoni Iraola at the end of the season.

items.title: Cesena's Jonathan Klinsmann breaks neck in game
items.summary: Goalkeeper Jonathan Klinsmann, the son of former Germany striker Jürgen Klinsmann, is recovering from a broken neck sustained playing for second-tier Italian side Cesena on Saturday.

items.title: Haaland's partner not happy with game 'scratches'
items.summary: Erling Haaland has joked that his partner "isn't happy" about the number of scratches on his body after the physical battles with Premier League defenders.

items.title: Crystal Palace v West Ham United: Premier League – live
items.summary: ⚽️ Premier League updates from the 8pm BST kick-off ⚽️ Latest table | Premier League review | Email Michael 4 min: Quite like this West Ham away kit, an all-beige number. Reminds me of their away kit in 1996-97. 2 min: Walker-Peters gets to the byline sends in a brilliant cross for West Ham but Munoz wins his header at the back post. Good work from the West Ham man, who seems to have displaced Wan-Bissaka as the first-choice right-back. Continue reading...

items.title: Real Madrid wint Youth League na zenuwslopende finale tegen Club Brugge
items.summary: Real Madrid is maandagavond de winnaar van de Youth League geworden. Underdog Club Brugge bood in Lausanne goed partij, maar moest in de strafschoppenserie toch buigen voor Los Merengues .

items.title: Sparta haalt Kolk naar Kasteel als rechterhand Nijkamp
items.summary: Santi Kolk (44) is aangesteld bij Sparta Rotterdam. De voormalige spits, op de hoofdfoto in zijn tijd als speler onder Maurice Steijn bij ADO Den Haag, wordt scout rondom het eerste elftal van de Spangenaren. Dat bevestigen ingewijden.

items.title: Vaste partner van Van Dijk stelt Liverpool-aanhang gerust
items.summary: Ibrahima Konaté beschikt over een aflopend contract bij Liverpool, maar alles wijst erop dat de verdediger deze verbintenis gaat verlengen en voorlopig op Anfield zal blijven. Dat deelt Konaté zelf met de buitenwereld: 'We zijn op de goede weg.'

items.title: 'Liam Rosenior is niet geschikt om trainer te zijn van een topclub'
items.summary: Het gaat niet goed met Chelsea, dat zes van zijn laatste zeven wedstrijden heeft verloren. Een deel van de supporters keert zich daardoor al tegen de pas in januari aangestelde Liam Rosenior . Ook kenners buitenlands voetbal Süleyman Öztürk en Bas van den Hoven trekken zijn kwaliteiten in twijfel: 'Hij is niet geschikt om trainer te zijn van een topclub'.

items.title: Prachtige beelden: San Sebastián loopt massaal uit voor huldiging
items.summary: Real Sociedad wordt maandag in San Sebastián-Donostia gehuldigd voor het winnen van de Copa del Rey. De Baskische ploeg won zaterdagavond de finale van Atlético Madrid, hetgeen zorgt voor uitzinnige taferelen op straat.

items.title: Lukaku holds positive clear-the-air talks with Napoli
items.summary: Romelu Lukaku will continue his rehabilitation from injury in Belgium after holding clear-the-air talks with Napoli.

items.title: Rose agrees to succeed Iraola at Bournemouth
items.summary: Marco Rose agrees to take over at Bournemouth when manager Andoni Iraola leaves at the end of the season.

items.title: Bournemouth confirm Marco Rose will take over from Andoni Iraola as head coach
items.summary: Rose signs three-year deal that starts in the summer His previous clubs include Borussia Dortmund Bournemouth have confirmed Marco Rose will replace Andoni Iraola as their head coach this summer. Iraola is stepping away at the end of his contract and Rose has signed a three-year deal to take his first Premier League job. The German, out of work since leaving RB Leipzig in March 2025, managed in the Champions League during his time at Borussia Dortmund, where he coached Erling Haaland and Jude Bellingham, and his high-intensity pressing style would appear to make him a good fit for Bournemouth. Continue reading...

items.title: Arsenal are despondent, but the Premier League race is far from over | Jonathan Wilson
items.summary: Manchester City eked a win by the slimmest of margins on Sunday, setting up a season finale that will be determined by nerves Sign up for the World Behind The Cup newsletter It was probably Arsenal’s best performance in two months, but that will be scant consolation. Manchester City’s win on Sunday leaves Pep Guardiola’s side in control of the title race; they will go top of the Premier League on goal difference if they beat Burnley at Turf Moor on Wednesday. Both sides will then have five games to play. Sunday’s game was decided by desperately fine margins. What prevented Eberechi Eze’s whipped shot from just outside the box going in? An inch? Half of one? Gabriel also struck the woodwork, while Kai Havertz headed a great chance a fraction over the crossbar in injury time. It was a defeat that has handed City the advantage in the title race, but it could very easily have been a battling draw to preserve Arsenal’s lead and, perhaps more importantly, restore morale. This is an extract from Soccer with Jonathan Wilson, a weekly look from the Guardian US at the game in Europe and beyond. Subscribe for free here. Have a question for Jonathan? Email soccerwithjw@theguardian.com, and he’ll answer the best in a future edition Continue reading...

items.title: 'Worst I've seen' - Leicester face relegation again
items.summary: BBC Sport takes a look at what Leicester City need in their seemingly doomed fight for Championship survival.

items.title: Romania legend Gheorghe Hagi returns as manager: ‘Our goal is to win every game’
items.summary: Hagi takes national job for second time, 25 years later ‘I was born to win, not just to exist,’ says 61-year-old Gheorghe Hagi has taken over as manager of the Romanian national team for a second time, with the former Barcelona star announcing ambitious targets for his new charges. “Our goal is to win every game. Our goal is to win the Nations League. Our goal is to qualify for the European Championship [in 2028],” Hagi said at a press conference in Bucharest. “I was born to win, not just to exist. Don’t you know my motto?” added the 61-year-old, nicknamed the “Maradona of the Carpathians”. Continue reading...

items.title: Rosenior feels '100%' support from Chelsea owners
items.summary: Chelsea head coach Liam Rosenior says he feels "100%" support from the club's ownership despite a run of four league defeats without scoring.

items.title: Marie-Louise Eta, Union Berlin’s ‘Football Goddess’, breaks new ground in Bundesliga
items.summary: Union’s interim head coach has been given a hospital pass and, despite a vastly improved performance, her team went down to Wolfsburg So different, but absolutely the same. If you had wanted a clear demonstration of why exactly 1. FC Union Berlin was just the place for Marie-Louise Eta to become the first female head coach in a top five European league, you got it on Saturday afternoon. Eta made her debut at the helm in the Bundesliga match with Wolfsburg and after a week in which both she and Union were global news, with coach and club visibly taken aback by the media flocking to Berlin to see her opening press conference and debut in charge, just being able to get to work was a relief. And there is really no place to ply your trade in Germany, or in Europe, quite like the Stadion An der Alten Försterei. As the team lineups are read out before kick-off there is a call and response, with each player’s name met with the collective reply “Fußballgott!” (Football God). On Saturday, when Eta’s name was announced, it was met with a united “Fußballgöttin!” (Football Goddess). On an extraordinary day, it was touchingly normal. Continue reading...

items.title: Konate says he is close to signing new Liverpool deal
items.summary: Ibrahima Konate says he is "close to an agreement" with Liverpool over a new contract and there is a "big chance" he will stay.

items.title: Laissé de côté par Anderlecht, il rêve... de la Coupe du Monde !
items.summary: Le RSC Anderlecht n'avait pas voulu, l'été dernier, d'Ismaël Baouf. Le défenseur central belgo-marocain avait donc rejoint le SC Cambuur, où il est incontournable cette saison.

items.title: Héél verdienstelijk onderuit! Real Madrid heeft strafschoppen nodig om Club Brugge van eindwinst in UEFA Youth League te houden
items.summary: Heeft Club NXT Belgische voetbalgeschiedenis geschreven? Voor sommigen misschien niet, maar dat is te kort door de bocht. Real Madrid had een strafschoppenserie nodig om de UEFA Youth League op het palmares bij te schrijven.

items.title: Quatre Unionistes à l'honneur, Cvetkovic réveille Anderlecht : voici notre onze du week-end
items.summary: Comme chaque lundi, nous vous proposons notre onze idéal du week-end. Celui-ci est fortement teinté de rouge et de bleu après la prestation de l'Union contre le Club de Bruges.

items.title: Is hij de beste speler op de Belgische velden? Duurste aanwinst van Union zal ook recordtransfer worden
items.summary: Anan Khalaili was in de topper tussen Union SG en Club Brugge wederom één van de absolute uitblinkers. Is de 21-jarige Israëliër de beste van België op zijn positie? De vraag stellen is ze beantwoorden.

items.title: L'ex-coach d'Openda a retrouvé un club en Premier League : signe d'un transfert imminent ?
items.summary: Auteur d'une excellente saison en Premier League, l'AFC Bournemouth a récemment annoncé que son coach Andoni Iraola s'en irait cet été. Marco Rose le remplacera.

items.title: 'PSG wil zich gericht versterken én richt pijlen op twee spelers die allesbehalve gemakkelijk los te weken zullen zijn'
items.summary: PSG wil de selectie komende zomer gericht versterken. De Franse grootmacht heeft twee namen op de verlanglijst staan.

items.title: L'ancien de Virton brûlé lors du drame de Crans-Montana obtient un premier contrat professionnel
items.summary: Très bonne nouvelle pour Tahirys Dos Santos, qui était passé durant sa formation par les équipes de jeunes de l'Excelsior Virton et a récemment été touché par le drame de Crans-Montana. Le jeune joueur a en effet signé un premier contrat professionnel.

items.title: ACHTERGROND: SSC Napoli heeft een héél duidelijke reden om constructief om te gaan met Romelu Lukaku
items.summary: Romelu Lukaku keert terug naar België om de revalidatie voort te zetten. Dat werd beslist in gezamenlijk overleg met SSC Napoli. De Italiaanse topclub heeft immers géén enkele baat bij kapitaalsvernietiging.

items.title: Zaakwaarnemer praat mond voorbij: "We hebben al gepraat met Anderlecht"
items.summary: RSC Anderlecht speurt de markt af naar defensieve versterking. Hossam Abdelmaguid staat op de radar van paars-wit. Dat heeft zijn zaakwaarnemer verklapt.

items.title: Relégué à la régulière, l'Olympic Charleroi se joint tout de même à la plainte contre le quota des U23
items.summary: La relégation de l'Olympic Charleroi est officielle, les Dogues ayant fini derniers de D1B. Mais lors d'un communiqué publié ce lundi, le club carolo précise se joindre à la plainte des autres clubs concernant les équipes U23 en D1B.
